zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Grandmesnil於大約1060年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯時，他的父親Hugh de Grandmesnil29歲，母親Adeliza Beaumont22歲。他於1078年之後與Emma d'Estouteville結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1136年6月1日在法國諾門迪奧內享年77歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪奧內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Grandmesnil于大约1060年出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯时，他的父亲Hugh de Grandmesnil29岁，母亲Adeliza Beaumont22岁。他于1078年之后与Emma d'Estouteville结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1136年6月1日在法国諾門迪奧內享年77岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪奧內。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Grandmesnil was born about 1060, in Calvados, Normandy, France, his father, Hugh de Grandmesnil, was 29 and his mother, Adeliza Beaumont, was 22. He married Emma d'Estouteville after 1078. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 June 1136, in Orne, Normandy, France, at the age of 77, and was buried in Orne, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Grandmesnil est né environ 1060, à Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Hugh de Grandmesnil, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Beaumont, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Emma d'Estouteville après 1078. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 juin 1136, à Orne, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Orne, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Grandmesnil um 1060 in Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Grandmesnil 29 und seine Mutter Adeliza Beaumont 22. Er hat nach 1078 Emma d'Estouteville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. Juni 1136 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Orne, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Orne, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Grandmesnil è nato il circa 1060 nel Calvados, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Hugh de Grandmesnil, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza Beaumont, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Emma d'Estouteville dopo il 1078. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 giugno 1136, nel Orne, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Orne, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Grandmesnilが約1060年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスで生まれた時，父Hugh de Grandmesnilは29歳，母Adeliza Beaumontは22歳であった。1078年以後にEmma d'Estoutevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1136年6月1日にフランスノーマンディオルンで77歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディオルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Grandmesnil(이)가 대략 1060년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Grandmesnil(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza Beaumont(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1078년 이후 Emma d'Estouteville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1136년 6월 1일 프랑스 노먼디 른에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 른에 묻혔다.

mn.Leicestershire, England: Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Grandmesnil nasceu aproximadamente 1060, em Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Hugh de Grandmesnil, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Beaumont, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma d'Estouteville após 1078. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de junho de 1136, em Orne, Normandie, França, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Orne, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Grandmesnil родился около 1060 г. в местности калвадос, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugh de Grandmesnil было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Beaumont, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma d'Estouteville после 1078 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 июня 1136 г. в местности орн, норманди, Франция в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности орн, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Grandmesnil nació aproximadamente 1060, en Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hugh de Grandmesnil, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Adeliza Beaumont, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Emma d'Estouteville después de 1078. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de junio de 1136, en Orne, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Orne, Normandie, Francia.
